title: knautia integrifolia var. urvillei
intro: Knautia integrifolia var. urvillei, also known as the red dead nettle or red knautia, is a plant species within the veronica family that is native to the alpine regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Knautia integrifolia var. urvillei include its ability to improve circulation, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
